page_metadata.biotools__summary: AUCpreD is a method that predicts intrinsically disordered regions (IDR). AUCpreD works well without sequence profile, comparing favorably to or even outperforming many methods using sequence profile.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: AUCpreD is a method that predicts intrinsically disordered regions (IDR). AUCpreD works well without sequence profile, comparing favorably to or even outperforming many methods using sequence profile.
